testcase.name: test_05_finished_products_show_recipe_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Product should have recipe assert (None) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa576aa11a80>('recipe') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa576aa11a80> = {'branch_id': 'b840c0b2-1019-42de-a856-6c320098ecb8', 'cost_per_unit': 5000.0, 'id': '96149782-a026-47d9-8e47-279102858536', 'item_type': 'finished', ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration19_branch_orders_recipe_deduction.py:193: in test_05_finished_products_show_recipe_status assert with_recipe.get("recipe") and len(with_recipe["recipe"]) > 0, "Product should have recipe" E AssertionError: Product should have recipe E assert (None) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa576aa11a80>('recipe') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa576aa11a80> = {'branch_id': 'b840c0b2-1019-42de-a856-6c320098ecb8', 'cost_per_unit': 5000.0, 'id': '96149782-a026-47d9-8e47-279102858536', 'item_type': 'finished', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_06_create_branch_order_with_recipe_deduction
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration19_branch_orders_recipe_deduction.py:240: in test_06_create_branch_order_with_recipe_deduction assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create order: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create order: {"detail":{"message":"بعض المنتجات ليس لها وصفة محددة","products_without_recipe":["TEST_برغر_لحم_اختبار_dbad1b"]}} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_13_order_details_show_deducted_materials
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration19_branch_orders_recipe_deduction.py:393: in test_13_order_details_show_deducted_materials assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create order: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create order: {"detail":{"message":"بعض المنتجات ليس لها وصفة محددة","products_without_recipe":["TEST_منتج_للتفاصيل_e276d7"]}} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_14_update_order_status
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration19_branch_orders_recipe_deduction.py:438: in test_14_update_order_status assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_15_order_with_multiple_products
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration19_branch_orders_recipe_deduction.py:491: in test_15_order_with_multiple_products assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create order: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create order: {"detail":{"message":"بعض المنتجات ليس لها وصفة محددة","products_without_recipe":["TEST_برغر_متعدد_8271dc","TEST_ساندويتش_جبن_4e8f49"]}} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
